title: example-social-post
scroll_stop: Explain why the first slide creates immediate attention.
retention: Explain why the viewer keeps swiping.
curiosity_engine: Viewer wants to know how to avoid the same outcome.
proof_device: Personal experience, concrete mistakes, visible source slides

idea_payload.private_pain_or_identity_gap: What they fear or feel behind the topic
idea_payload.implied_fix_direction: What kind of solution the post points toward

transferable_pattern: Personal bad outcome becomes a warning system for the viewer.
safe_rewrite_formula: How I became [bad outcome], and how you avoid it.
example_adapted_direction: How I wasted my first season, and how you avoid it.

account_fit.claim_or_proof_risks: Avoid unverifiable performance claims unless the account can support them.
account_fit.what_not_to_copy: Do not copy the exact personal story or slide wording.

next_use: Use when a personal failure can credibly teach the audience what to avoid.
